Title: Lancome Visionnaire Peel 30ml
Body (HTML): Lancome Visionnaire Peel 30ml peel to reveal smooth, even, and radiant skin! This easy to use, leave-on liquid nighttime face peel works to gently exfoliate skin surface cells and address multiple skin concerns: uneven skin texture, appearance of pores, wrinkles and fine lines, and dark spots. Inspired by fitness interval training, Visionnaire Crescendo? combines two different formulas each with their own unique ingredient combination to be used over a 28-night period as part of an interval skin training experience. Start with Phase 1 for the first 14 nights, formulated with 5% bio-acids such as fruit acids and quinoa husk extract that works to reduce the appearance of pores, improve skins texture, and radiance. Then, switch to Phase 2 for the last 14 nights. Formulated with 10% derma-acids, including 0.5% salicylic acid and 9.5% pure glycolic acid, this phase reduces the appearance of fine lines, wrinkles, and dark spots. Repeat the 28-night skin interval training experience as desired.

Chloe Love Story Sensuelle Woman Eau De Parfum is a new elegant and feminine interpretation of the Love Story orange blossom scent. Refined and voluptuous notes come together in a uniquely seductive combination.

Sunny heliotrope, with its subtle vanilla scent, brings sweetness to the floral orange blossom. The base note of sandalwood adds a milky, velvety depth.

The bottle's padlock design with its distinctive pleated effect symbolises Parisian romance. The transparent glass reveals the fragrance's delicate colour of pink blush with a coral undertone, evoking the setting sun. Hand-tied around the bottle's neck, the romantic ribbon echoes the same youthful and delicate hue.

Title: Chloe Nomade Absolu Woman Eau De Parfum
Body (HTML):
Chloe Nomade Absolu Woman Eau De Parfum imbued with the delicate, scented warmth of a fantasy destination, Nomade Absolu reveals woody chypre for a more intense interpretation of the original Nomade Eau de Parfum. Created by Quentin Bisch, the fragrance embodies the freedom-loving, independent woman.

The bold, masculine character of oak moss remains at the vibrant note of Nomade, lifted here by sweet and sumptuous Mirabelle plum. The fruity, aromatic inflections of velvety davana lend a sensuousness offset by the creamy, woody richness of soft sandalwood.

Adorned in warm colours, the Nomade Absolu de Parfum bottle reveals chic contrasts in the Maison's characteristic graphic lines, golden studs and hazelnut leather.

Title: Chloe Nomade Naturelle Woman Eau De Parfum
Body (HTML):
Chloe Nomade Naturelle Woman Eau De Parfum reinvents its free-spirited Nomade fragrance in this 100% natural-origin Eau de Parfum. Reflecting a quest for freedom and new encounters, the radiant, feminine fragrance celebrates the merging of cultures.

Nomade Eau de Parfum Naturelle centres on a gourmand jasmine heart. The essence of bergamot bursts through, while a smooth date accord complements the irresistible radiance of Egyptian jasmine absolute. Vanilla and sandalwood weave a warm, addictive base.

This vegan, 100% natural-origin Eau de Parfum contains no artificial colouring. It is formulated with naturally derived alcohol and water – nothing else. The main ingredient, jasmine, is harvested in Egypt based on responsible practices.

The emblematic Nomade bottle is reinvented in ochre tones inspired by nature. A braid, tied around the neck of the bottle, represents the bonds woven through travel and ongoing encounters. This symbolic motif is also engraved in the glass.
